title: Wrong constraint name in error message of constraint violation
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (user_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, username TEXT NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE orders (order_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, user_id INTEGER, FOREIGN KEY (user_id) REFERENCES users(user_id));
CREATE TABLE payments (payment_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, order_id INTEGER, amount REAL NOT NULL, FOREIGN KEY (order_id) REFERENCES orders(order_id));
key_bug_features: inserting into table with foreign key references
